history.content:
<thought>
The agent is at row2, col1, facing right. The goal is at row8, col7. The leftmost column (col1) is clear from row2 to row8. To move downward, I need to turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, and the cell directly below me is empty (.), so I can move forward. The path down column 2 is clear all the way to row8, where the goal is at row8, col7. I'll start moving downward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, and the cell directly below me is empty (.), so I can move forward. I need to go down to the bottom row (row9) to get to the goal's row.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD</action>

<thought>
I am at row4, col2 facing down. The cell directly below (row5, col2) is empty (.). I need to move down to row8, then right to the goal. Continue moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row5, col2, facing down. The cell directly below (row6, col2) is empty. I need to keep moving down to reach row8, then turn right and move to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row6, col1 facing down. The cell directly below (row7, col1) is a floor (`.`). I can move forward to get closer to the goal at row8, col7. Continue moving down.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row7, col2 facing down. The cell directly below (row8, col2) is a floor. I can move forward to get to the bottom row, closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the bottom row, facing down. The cell below is a wall. I need to go right towards the goal. Turning left (counter-clockwise) from down will face me right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right on the bottom row. The goal is at the far right of this same row. The cells in between are all empty floor, so I can move forward directly towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing right, and there are only empty floor cells between me and the goal. I should continue moving forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing right, and the path to the goal is clear with only empty floor cells. I will move forward again.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing right, and the path to the goal is clear with empty cells. Two more moves forward will reach the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right and the path ahead is clear: one empty cell to the right, then the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now one cell to the left of the goal, facing right. Moving forward will take me onto the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
